archDivMultiAgentEnvironmentWhereDeliber: Multi-agent environment where deliberation occurs. Agents represent CFO, CISO, Risk, Strategy, and other stakeholder perspectives.
archDivProjectHumeAdversarialAgentThat: Project HUME. Adversarial agent that challenges consensus, probing for blind spots and failure modes.
archDivProjectSmithStrategicGrowthAnd: Project SMITH. Strategic growth and efficiency optimizer. Synthesizes data into actionable intelligence.
archDivStakeholderSimulationAgentModelsC: Stakeholder simulation agent. Models customer, employee, and regulator perspectives before they become problems.
archDivMetaModelThatResolvesAgent: Meta-model that resolves agent conflict into a final, defensible recommendation with full lineage.
archDivTheKillSwitchBinaryLogic: The Kill Switch. Binary logic gate that blocks actions violating risk policy. No override without human approval + audit trail.
archDivImpartialObserverModuleAdamSmith: "Impartial Observer" module (Adam Smith's model). Flags reputational and ethical risks before execution.
archDivRealTimeLookupOfRegulatory: Real-time lookup of regulatory texts — GDPR, Basel III, HIPAA, internal bylaws. Updated continuously.
archDivImmutableLedgerCryptographicallyH: Immutable ledger. Cryptographically hashes every decision for audit. Tamper-evident chain of custody.
archDivStripsPiiBeforeItEnters: Strips PII before it enters the context window. Data minimization by design.
archDivManagesSecureUnidirectionalDataFl: Manages secure, unidirectional data flow. Optical diode logic for classified environments.
archDivCryptographicallyDeletesNonEssent: Cryptographically deletes non-essential "thought processes" to minimize discovery risk in litigation.
archDivTimeTravelEngineReplaysState: Time-travel engine. Replays state at T-1 to prove why a decision was made at that moment in time.
archDivMapsRelationshipsBetweenEntitiesC: Maps relationships between entities. "CEO" connects to "Risk Policy A" connects to "Regulatory Filing B".
archDivTagsEveryTokenWithIts: Tags every token with its origin. "CRM Record #1234" or "SEC Filing 10-K Page 47".
archDivCentralNervousSystemRoutesData: Central nervous system. Routes data between storage, agents, and outputs with full audit trail.
archDivTranslatesNaturalLanguageIntentIn: Translates natural language intent into structured system actions. No code required.
archDivVerifiesOperatorIdentityViaVoice: Verifies operator identity via voice (optional). Multi-factor authentication for high-stakes decisions.
archDivFormatsFinalOutputIntoRequired: Formats final output into required templates — PDF, JSON, email, regulatory filing format.
archDivMonteCarloSimulationsBasedOn: Monte Carlo simulations based on agent debates. Thousands of futures, ranked by probability and impact.
archDivProjectsCurrentDataLinesForward: Projects current data lines forward. Identifies inflection points and emerging risks before they materialize.
archDivAuthorizedToActCallApis: Authorized to act: call APIs, send emails, trigger workflows. Active only after ethics gate approval.
archDivPreBuiltSovereignIntegrationsErp: Pre-built sovereign integrations. ERP, CRM, banking core, HRIS. No data leaves customer perimeter.
archDivMonitorsIfModelsDeviateFrom: Monitors if models deviate from baseline behavior. Alerts before degradation becomes liability.
archDivPeriodicTestsAgainstGroundTruth: Periodic tests against "Ground Truth" datasets. Catches hallucination before it reaches production.
archDivManagesVramComputeLoadOn: Manages VRAM/compute load on local hardware. Prevents resource starvation in air-gapped deployments.
archDivHardwareEnforcedOneWayData: Hardware-enforced one-way data flow. Information exits the secure enclave; nothing enters without cryptographic authorization.
archDivReinforcementLearningFromHumanFee: Reinforcement learning from human feedback that runs entirely on-premises. Fine-tune models without sending data to any external service.
archDivMultiOrganizationFederatedDecisio: Multi-organization federated decision sharing. Each node retains sovereignty; only signed decision summaries cross organizational boundaries.
archDivPostQuantumKeyManagementUsing: Post-quantum key management using lattice-based cryptography (Dilithium, SPHINCS+, Falcon). Future-proofed against quantum decryption threats.
archDivAiConstitutionalCourtFormalDisput: AI Constitutional Court — formal dispute resolution between agents with precedent tracking. When agents disagree, the court decides with binding governance.
archDivHardwareSignedDecisionsViaTrusted: Hardware-signed decisions via Trusted Platform Module. Cryptographic proof that a decision was made on a specific physical machine — forgery-proof.
archDivTimeLockedDecisionRevealsSensitiv: Time-locked decision reveals. Sensitive decisions are encrypted until a specified future date — preventing premature disclosure.
archDivTripwireBasedIntrusionDetectionCa: Tripwire-based intrusion detection. Canary tokens embedded in decision artifacts detect unauthorized access or exfiltration attempts.
archDivTheDefensibleAiPlatformInstitutio: The Defensible AI Platform — institutional immune system scoring, synthetic media authentication, and RFC 3161 timestamping.
